nasb.text: Jesus *said to them, “Come and have breakfast.” None of the disciples ventured to question Him, “Who are You?” knowing that it was the Lord.

esv.text: Jesus said to them, “Come and have breakfast.” Now none of the disciples dared ask him, “Who are you?” They knew it was the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“你們來，吃早飯吧。”門徒中沒有一個人敢問他：“你是誰？”因為知道他是主。

ccb.text: 耶稣又说：“你们来吃早餐吧！”没有一个门徒敢问祂是谁，他们都知道祂是主。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“来吃早饭吧。”但没有一个门徒敢问他：“你是谁？”因为他们知道是主。
